subparts.text: Define sound and explain its basic characteristics
What is reverberation time? How is it measured?
Differentiate between reflection, absorption, and diffusion of sound.
What are acoustic materials? Explain their purpose with examples?
A Person clapped his hands near the cliff and heard the echo after 5 s. What is the distance of the cliff from the person, if the speed of the sound is taken as 340m/sec?
Define noise. What is the difference between airborne noise and structure-borne noise?
What are the various acoustic defects in buildings? Suggest remedies for each defect.
What are the factors affecting the acoustics of an auditorium?
Explain the STC rating and its importance in building acoustics.
A hall of Volume 5500Cubic-m has a Reverberation time of 2.3 sec. The sound-absorbing surface of the hall has an area of 750 sqm. Calculate the average absorption coefficient.
